candidates.why: Direct operating revenue line and best match for top-line sales/revenue.
Also a revenue total and appears equal to reported revenue across shown years; useful as fallback label.
Header/section label rather than a populated revenue amount row.

variables.notes: Selected the main reported revenue line with a semantically close fallback label as a priority list; do not sum them.

candidates.why: Best direct match for cost of sales / cost of revenues.
Direct production/input cost component, but appears to be part of total cost of operating revenue rather than the full COGS line.

candidates.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility - Unclassified
candidates.why: Same material-cost component, likely underlying part of cost of operating revenue.
Too vague and unpopulated in preview relative to the clearer total cost row.
Balance sheet inventory balance, not income statement COGS.

variables.notes: Chose the direct cost-of-revenue line and avoided material expense components to prevent partial capture or double counting.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and already excludes R&D; preferred over components/totals per rule.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Valid SG&A component, but component rows should not be used when an explicit populated SG&A row exists.
Possible SG&A component but incomplete/unclassified and inferior to explicit SG&A row.
Overly broad and includes COGS/other items, so not suitable when explicit SG&A exists.
R&D line exists separately but chosen SG&A row explicitly excludes R&D, so it should not be added here.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit populated SG&A row exists and is preferred. Because this row explicitly excludes R&D, no separate R&D row is added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Only dedicated R&D expense line visible on the income statement.
Section/header rather than a numeric expense row.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Not an R&D expense row; indicates SG&A excludes R&D.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: The selected SG&A row explicitly excludes R&D, so XRD should be left empty to avoid subtracting an amount that is not included in XSGA_COMPONENTS. The only dedicated R&D row shown is supplemental and appears zero/blank in the preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best recurring interest-expense line on the income statement.
Also a clean recurring interest line, but appears duplicative of the net-of-capitalized-interest row.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring finance cost, but likely already included in total interest expense; selecting it in addition would risk double counting.
Not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Used the primary recurring interest expense line and avoided adding lease-interest supplemental or duplicate total interest labels to prevent double counting.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which is preferred for BE.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent owner-attributable equity line; good fallback.
Also appears to represent parent/common equity excluding minority interest; acceptable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Includes minority interest, so not preferred for BE when separate parent equity exists.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total

variables.notes: Selected parent-attributable equity to exclude minority interest from BE, consistent with the BE + MIB construction.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest / minority interest equity line.
Unpopulated and not the equity NCI line needed for MIB here.
Income statement profit attribution, not balance-sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Direct match for balance-sheet minority/non-controlling interest.
